# Superscript Examples

Einstein's famous equation: E = mc<sup>2</sup>

The area of a circle is πr<sup>2</sup>, and the volume of a sphere is <sup>4</sup>/<sub>3</sub>πr<sup>3</sup>.

This is a footnote reference.<sup>1</sup>

Ordinals: 1<sup>st</sup>, 2<sup>nd</sup>, 3<sup>rd</sup>, 4<sup>th</sup>
